Index.resume_content: Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience in Web/App development and a strong background in UI/UX design. Skilled in managing the full product cycle-from user research and wireframing to coding. My multidisciplinary approach ensures optimized workflows and high-quality products that balance seamless functionality with superior aesthetics.

Skill.flutter: Clean architecture, Bloc, GetX, Provider, Map, Biometrics, Google ads, (Android/IOS)
Skill.react: Next.js, Tailwind, MUI, SEO, HTML/CSS, Bootstrap, Shadcn-ui, Dark-mode, multi language
Skill.figma: Knowledge about UI/UX, Proficient in figma, Web, Mobile App
Skill.node: Nest.js, Socket, API, Crawl Data, Authenticate, Swagger, Schedule
Skill.database: MySQL, Mongo db, Postgres, SQL Server
Skill.docker: I can use docker to run the project, deploy, CI/CD with Gitlab-runner, use Nginx to public server
Skill.ruby: I can create a base api, Swagger, implementing secure payment/transaction flows
Skill.java: I can create a base api, working with microservice, Java Spring Boot, Authenticate, Token.

Experience.title: Experience
Experience.responsibility_1-1_a: Managed the operation and development of 18 recruitment applications customized for 18 distinct corporate clients.
Experience.responsibility_1-1_b: Handled routine maintenance and version upgrades to ensure platform compatibility and stability.
Experience.responsibility_1-1_c: Enhanced the payment transfer flow and push notification engine for better reliability.
Experience.responsibility_1-2_a: Design & Analysis: Researched functional business logic on old software, analyzed complex calculation logic within PowerBuilder source code to wrote API Design Documents.
Experience.responsibility_1-2_b: Programming: Developed code according to design docs, integrated APIs between Front-end and Back-end, and wrote unit tests. Participated in coding for Jasper file exports.
Experience.responsibility_1-2_c: UT/IT: Created test cases and performed testing in the staging environment. Communicated with overseas/remote branches via Redmine for clarification and bug fixing.
Experience.responsibility_2-1_a: Joined the customer requirement survey phase. Designed UI on Figma and demoed the system to customers for feedback.
Experience.responsibility_2-1_b: Leadership: Managed the team by estimating workloads and delegating tasks to ensure efficient project delivery.
Experience.responsibility_2-1_c: Programming: Configured JWT-based authentication to enhance system security. Built modular and reusable components to optimize UI development and maintainability.
Experience.responsibility_2-2_a: Joined the customer requirement survey phase. Designed UI on Figma and demoed the system to customers for feedback.
Experience.responsibility_2-2_b: Programmed functions in a Microservices environment; set up Java-based authorization. Managed FE state with Vuex configuration.
Experience.responsibility_2-3_a: Designed user interfaces for a mobile application, ensuring a user-friendly experience.
Experience.responsibility_2-3_b: Translated Figma designs into functional interfaces using Flutter. Integrated APIs to implement core features of the application.
Experience.responsibility_3-1_a: Leadership & Management: Acted as Sub-lead responsible for task allocation, progress monitoring, and conducting code reviews to ensure high software quality.
Experience.responsibility_3-1_b: Architecture & Core Development: Established the project foundation by defining a scalable Flutter architecture with GetX and configuring Firebase for end-to-end push notification workflows. Developed specialized video playback features.
Experience.responsibility_3-2_a: Feature Integration: Integrated Google Maps API to enable real-time tracking and visualization of diseased crop areas.
Experience.responsibility_3-2_b: Data Visualization: Processed and rendered complex analytical data into intuitive, user-friendly UI components.
Experience.responsibility_3-2_c: UI/UX Redesign: Led the UI upgrade by designing high-fidelity prototypes in Figma to enhance the overall user experience.
Experience.responsibility_3-2_d: App Optimization: Actively contributed to continuous application improvements and performance tuning.
Experience.responsibility_3-3_a: Developed Meeting Management APIs with NestJS and MySQL.
Experience.responsibility_3-3_b: Architected and implemented a PostgreSQL-to-MySQL data migration tool to streamline system transitions.

Projects.detail_1: A simple game written in Java. You can control a character to defeat enemies.
Projects.detail_2: Design a healthcare application for the Hậu Giang Provincial Department of Health.
Projects.detail_3: An application that allows users to search for and listen to movie soundtracks.
Projects.detail_4: A personal project about designing a website for reading manhwa and news about popular anime.
Projects.detail_5: A website that allows users to draw graphs with vertices and edges. They can run Kruskal's algorithm to find the minimum spanning tree on the graph.
Projects.detail_6: A simple block-stacking game developed using C/C++ for the console.
